partial_progress.details: Phases 2-3 COMPLETED. Phase 4 covering proof BLOCKED with 3 sorries at lines 525, 562, 595. Mathematical analysis indicates blocking formula approach may be insufficient: the constraints on W do not directly constrain intermediate K.

review_reason: The covering proof (discreteImmediateSucc_covers) cannot be completed with the current blocking formula approach. Analysis reveals: (1) Blocking formulas constrain W but not intermediate K directly. (2) Cases where phi in K, neg phi in W cannot derive phi in W (impossible) and cannot derive contradiction without additional structure. (3) The covering property may require different construction or additional assumptions. Options: A) Revise blocking formula construction. B) Accept axiom for covering (discrete_Icc_finite_axiom already exists). C) Prove covering at quotient level instead of set level.

errors.message: Covering proof has 3 sorries. Blocking formula constraints (neg phi or neg G(phi) in W) don't propagate to intermediate K. Mathematical obstacle, not tactical.
errors.recommendation: Review blocking formula approach. Consider whether covering requires stronger construction or should use existing axiom.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phases 2-3 complete (seed consistency via T-axiom, discreteImmediateSucc definition). Phase 4 covering proof blocked: blocking formulas constrain W but not intermediate K. Requires plan revision or alternative approach.
